final:
module top_module(input clk, reset, enable, load,
   input [31:0] load_value,
   output reg [31:0] count);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
      if (reset) begin
         count <= 0;
      end else if (load) begin
         count <= load_value;
      end else if (enable) begin
         count <= count + 1;
      end
   end
   
endmodule
